Command:
bun run --cwd packages/ui test:chat-sheet-e2e -- --only-autoscroll

Result:
CHAT-SHEET E2E PASSED

Key assertions:
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL opens the sheet to FULL
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL fixture has real overflow (scrollHeight=2843, clientHeight=642)
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL single streamed growth exceeds 80px (712px)
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL stays pinned after >80px growth (delta=0)
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL real wheel scroll moves reader into history (2945 -> 2535)
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL preserves reading scrollback on growth (2535 -> 2535)
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL shows jump-to-latest while reader is above bottom
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL jump-to-latest re-pins to bottom (delta=18)
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL opens the sheet to FULL
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL fixture has real overflow (scrollHeight=2843, clientHeight=1941)
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL single streamed growth exceeds 80px (712px)
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL stays pinned after >80px growth (delta=0)
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL real touch scroll moves reader into history (1660 -> 1308)
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL preserves reading scrollback on growth (1308 -> 1308)
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL shows jump-to-latest while reader is above bottom
- [touch] AUTOSCROLL jump-to-latest re-pins to bottom (delta=17)
- no uncaught page errors (0)
- no error-level console messages (0)

Browser console sample:
- [fixture] setComposerHasDraft -> false
- [fixture] phase=responding messages=41 recording=false
- [fixture] growLastAssistant length=2422
- [fixture] appendAssistant length=71

Manual review:
- Opened 13690-chat-autoscroll-desktop-repinned.png. The full chat sheet is repinned at the bottom after the jump action, with the fresh assistant line visible above the composer and no broken overlay state.
- Opened 13690-chat-autoscroll-mobile-repinned.png. The mobile full-page capture shows the chat transcript repinned at the bottom with the streamed burst and fresh assistant line visible above the composer.

Canary command:
Temporarily changed `useThreadAutoScroll({ enabled: threadPresented })` to `enabled: false`, then ran:
bun run --cwd packages/ui test:chat-sheet-e2e -- --only-autoscroll

Canary result:
Expected failure. The autoscroll leg caught the disabled hook:
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL starts pinned to bottom failed with delta=2201
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL stays pinned after >80px growth failed with delta=2913
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL stays pinned after a new assistant line failed with delta=2907
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL real wheel scroll moves reader into history failed because scrollTop stayed 0
- [mouse] AUTOSCROLL shows jump-to-latest while reader is above bottom failed, then clicking `chat-jump-to-latest` timed out

Canary cleanup:
Restored `ContinuousChatOverlay.tsx` to the passing implementation before committing this evidence.

Full chat-sheet command:
bun run --cwd packages/ui test:chat-sheet-e2e

Full chat-sheet result:
CHAT-SHEET E2E PASSED

Full chat-sheet coverage observed in the passing run:
- Desktop and real-touch detent drag suites passed, including restored #13531 maximize/restore-zone behavior.
- Mouse and touch AUTOSCROLL suites passed inside the full run.
- Grabber horizontal real-touch swipe and janked-main-thread swipe paths passed.
- Voice, dictation, push-to-talk, keyboard, no-provider, pill morph, navigation, maximize, state mapping, streaming, multi-send, and onboarding states passed.
- Browser console checks passed: no uncaught page errors, no error-level console messages, and fixture voice interaction logged.

Full chat-sheet manual review:
- Opened the latest desktop and mobile autoscroll repinned screenshots copied from the full run.
- Reviewed the full drag-suite video artifact path: 13690-chat-sheet-full-drag-suite.webm.

App audit command:
bun run --cwd packages/app audit:app

App audit result:
373 passed (17.0m)

App audit machine summary:
- 372 findings
- broken=0
- needs-work=0
- needs-eyeball=24
- good=348
- minimalism-budget-failures=0
- minimalism-ratchet-failures=0
- hover-probe-failures=72
- density-probe-failures=0

App audit builtin-chat report:
- mobile-portrait: verdict=good, console errors=0, blue colors=none, hover probe failures=none, density probe failures=none, floating chat overlay present=yes, floating chat overlay clearance=clear
- mobile-landscape: verdict=good, console errors=0, blue colors=none, hover probe failures=none, density probe failures=none, floating chat overlay present=yes, floating chat overlay clearance=clear

App audit manual review:
- Opened 13690-app-audit-chat-desktop-landscape.png. Chat launcher/input is visible and unobstructed at the bottom, with no broken sheet framing.
- Opened 13690-app-audit-chat-mobile-portrait.png. Chat input is anchored at the bottom, prompt pills fit, and no visible overlap is present.
- Opened 13690-app-audit-chat-mobile-landscape.png. Chat input is anchored and clear in the constrained landscape layout.
- Opened 13690-app-audit-chat-ipad-portrait.png. Chat input is anchored and clear with ample spacing.
